_comment: Time-bound XP challenges and promotional campaigns funded by sponsors.

schema.title: string — user-facing campaign name
schema.description: string — brief explanation of the challenge
schema.surface: string — which app surface this campaign targets
schema.xpMultiplier: number — XP multiplier during campaign (e.g. 2 for double)
schema.bonusXp: number — flat bonus XP on completion

requirements.actionType: string — feed | water_change | treatment | water_test | spawn
requirements.count: number — how many times the action must be performed

reward.value: string — badge name, code, or boost description
